title: Has anyone tried the new Horizon AI models for trend prediction?
author: InternationalTell772
selftext:
So I’ve been messing around with a few different AI agents for crypto and forex lately, and I finally got access to the Horizon beta. I know everyone and their mom is launching a "trading bot" these days, but the neural network they’re using for trend prediction actually seems to hold up during high volatility.

I’ve been running a small bag through it for about two weeks now. What’s actually interesting is how it handles the stop-losses compared to the standard grid bots I used on Binance. It feels a lot more "human" in how it scales out of positions rather than just hitting a hard wall and liquidation. 

Has anyone else here tried the Horizon models yet? I'm curious if you guys are seeing better results on the 1h or 4h timeframes. I’m currently using the Laurenz Bauer setup since it was recommended for mid-cap pairs. 

If you want to check it out, I’m using this link: https://join.horizon.trade/laurenz-bauer

Would love to compare notes on the backtesting data if anyone has run it through a full bear cycle yet.
